title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TVS Supply Chain Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TVS Supply Chain Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!
